---
title: "Sir George Grove"
---

## Sir George Grove

**Dates:** (1820-1900)

### Description

assistant editor of <i>Macmillan's Magazine</i>

### Biography

He was assistant editor from 1866; famous as the editor of the <i>Dictionary of Music</i>;  he was knighted in 1883.

### Letters

- Letter from July 9th 1879
- Letter from Feb 17th [1866]    

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
